entries.title: Annapurna Circuit Trekking
entries.description: An adventurous journey crossing the Thorong La Pass at 5,416m, witnessing majestic peaks and high-altitude vistas.

entries.title: Kushma Bungee Jumping
entries.description: Taking the leap from the world's second highest suspension bridge bungee jump over the wild Kali Gandaki river canyon.

entries.title: Kathmandu Valley Photo Walks
entries.description: Documenting ancient Newari architecture, heritage structures, and street culture through graphic visual capture.
